title: Add default SARIF path excludes for third-party noise
description: Default-filter node_modules/vendor/generated-style findings from SARIF summaries while allowing explicit override via CLI flags.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Implementing default exclude patterns for SARIF summaries (node_modules/vendor/.codeql mirror noise) with CLI override to include third-party findings when explicitly requested.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Completed default-noise filtering: added built-in SARIF exclude patterns for node_modules/vendor/.codeql, new CLI flags --exclude-files and --include-third-party, and coverage in CLI+SARIF tests. Verified against Tactus reports: py/multiple-definition now shows only first-party/generated hit, and py/empty-except count dropped after dependency-path suppression.
